svg.text: Creating a new feature — step by step

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me an example of a Compose Screen using BaseScreen')
sendPrompt('Show me an example of a HiltViewModel extending BaseViewModel')
sendPrompt('Show me how to create a Repository interface and implementation')
sendPrompt('How do I register a repository binding in Hilt RepositoryModule?')
sendPrompt('How do I add a new navigation destination in AppDestination and AppNavigation?')
